calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
David Reidy, Esq. for Plaintiff: Coca Development Retail, LLC.
Plaintiff's witness Rita Hernandez was present, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by Defendant: Mark Reuben Gallery, Inc.
Default entered against Defendant - 11/28/07.
Does Defendants dismissed - 01/15/08.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Mark Reuben Gallery, Inc. as follows:
Damages/Principal $27,573.81
Prejudgment Interest $1,638.35
Attorney's Fees $5,177.50
Costs $543.00, for a total of $34,933.16
Judgment signed in open court.
